name: Marcus Roberts
abstract: Marthaniel "Marcus" Roberts (born August 7, 1963) is an American jazz pianist, composer, arranger, bandleader, and teacher.

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: I first joined Marcus’s group in ’94... We did Portraits in Blue... We did a trio record of original music called Time and Circumstance... we did a lot of work.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Chick Corea
about_quotes.evidence: Marcus Roberts came down to the Blue Note and played a night with me last November.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chick Corea — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Delfeayo Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: I had produced Marcus Roberts’s first record. Elvin was on that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Delfeayo Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
